#### Impact: _What functionalities were impacted_
 
### ✅ What was done:
- _Fixed X rule_
- _Create Unit Test to validate the criteria_
 
### 📋 Checklist:
 
- [ ] Dev testing is complete
- [ ] Branch is built on [Jenkins](https://as-jenkins-master.aws.wiley.com/job/build/job/as-fd-app/)
- [ ] Branch is properly named (`feature/WOAA-XXXX` or `bugfix/WOAA-XXXX`)
 
### Unit tests
 
- [ ] Unit tests are developed/modified (if Unit tests are relevant)
- [ ] Unit tests are not relevant
 
### Test cases
 
- [ ] Test cases are agreed with QA

_Any relevant information related to the PR (such as related PRs)_
